name: Buried on a Beach
description:
[CONTENT WARNING: femdom, facesitting, feet, scat, watersports, noncon, violence]


You are a new lifeguard at the women-only beach. However, you fell asleep on your first day on the job. When you wake up, you find yourself buried in sand and nobody believes that you're a lifeguard. They just think you're a creep who is being taught a lesson.

Malepov for story reasons, but I can make a fempov version if there's demand.
creator: Sly Slave
